imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Security-themed vault logo icon with lock and shield elements in monochrome (vault-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Abstract geometric background pattern suggesting encrypted data in dark tones (encrypted-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create a document upload interface with file picker, drag-and-drop support, client-side encryption before upload, and upload progress indicator
Build a document vault dashboard displaying a list of user's documents with name, upload date, file size, and action buttons for download and delete
Implement client-side file encryption and decryption using Web Crypto API with a user-specific encryption key derived from their Internet Identity principal
Add Internet Identity authentication flow requiring users to authenticate before accessing the document vault
Design a cohesive visual theme with a secure, professional aesthetic using dark tones, minimalist layout, and subtle security-focused design elements that reinforce trust and data protection

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend document storage system with stable memory persistence that stores document metadata (id, name, owner principal, upload timestamp, file size, content hash) and encrypted document content as Blob data

Implement backend methods for uploading documents (addDocument), retrieving document list for authenticated user (listMyDocuments), downloading specific documents by ID (getDocument), and deleting user's own documents (deleteDocument)
Implement access control ensuring users can only access, download, and delete their own documents based on Internet Identity principal
